title: Stack overflow in sqlite3_str_vappendf, caused by int overflow
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_mysql_a(b DOUBLE NOT NULL UNIQUE);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_mysql_c AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_mysql_a FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_mysql_a SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(b, 2147483647) FROM fuzz_mysql_a;
key_bug_features: CREATE TRIGGER c INSERT ON a BEGIN INSERT INTO a
